headline: Top 5 Non-AI S&P 500 Stock Picks for 2H 2026 That Have Surged in 1H
summary: ADM, CASY, DVA, CVS and BEN top a list of five non-AI S&P 500 stocks that surged more than 30% in 1H 2026 and still show momentum for 2H.

raw.headline: Top 5 Non-AI S&P 500 Stock Picks for 2H 2026 That Have Surged in 1H
raw.summary: ADM, CASY, DVA, CVS and BEN top a list of five non-AI S&P 500 stocks that surged more than 30% in 1H 2026 and still show momentum for 2H.

headline: 3 Profitable Stocks We Think Twice About
summary: While profitability is essential, it doesn’t guarantee long-term success. Some companies that rest on their margins will lose ground as competition intensifies — as Jeff Bezos said, “Your margin is my opportunity”.

raw.headline: 3 Profitable Stocks We Think Twice About
